description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat, light gray roof and dark gray exterior walls. The structure features multiple rectangular windows with white frames, evenly distributed along the visible facades. There is a fenced driveway with a parked car on one side and a green backyard area with a basketball hoop on the other. The rear of the bungalow includes a small patio area with outdoor furniture and a visible door leading inside. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces. The building sits within a low perimeter fence, providing separation from the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, dark gray walls, white-framed windows, a driveway, and a backyard with a basketball hoop.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway with a car, several white-framed windows, and the backyard with a basketball hoop.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, a small patio with outdoor furniture, and a central door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and a fenced area with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, a small porch area, and a circular driveway section.
